title: Natco Pharma, Lupin alliance secures U.S. FDA nod for generic breast cancer drug
content:
Natco Pharma and Lupin's alliance has received U.S. FDA approval.
*   The approval is specifically for a generic breast cancer drug.
*   This greenlights the drug's entry into the U.S. market.

title: Zyoin Group & KDEM sign MoU to accelerate GCC growth in Karnataka
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Zyoin Group and KDEM (Karnataka Digital Economy Mission) have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU).
*   The agreement aims to accelerate the growth of Global Capability Centers (GCCs).
*   This growth initiative will specifically take place within the state of Karnataka.

title: RBI dismisses gold sale rumours; physical reserves stand steady at 880.52 tonnes
content:
The RBI has denied rumours about selling its gold reserves.
*   Its physical gold reserves remain steady.
*   The current reserve stands at 880.52 tonnes.
